'''鈭歞h-j-g''' ('''dhajaga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:umbedraw|umbedraw]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-j-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:umbedraw|umbedraw]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-j-g
|-
! Lemma
| dhajaga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhajagithi|dhajagithi]] || [[word:dhajagiji|dhajagiji]] || [[word:dhajagishi|dhajagishi]] || [[word:dhajagi|dhajagi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhajaguthuth|dhajaguthuth]] || [[word:dhajagujuj|dhajagujuj]] || [[word:dhajagushush|dhajagushush]] || [[word:dhajag|dhajag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhajaguthu|dhajaguthu]] || [[word:dhajaguju|dhajaguju]] || [[word:dhajagushu|dhajagushu]] || [[word:dhajagu|dhajagu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhajagufuth|dhajagufuth]] || [[word:dhajagufuj|dhajagufuj]] || [[word:dhajagufush|dhajagufush]] || [[word:dhajaguf|dhajaguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhajagethe|dhajagethe]] || [[word:dhajageje|dhajageje]] || [[word:dhajageshe|dhajageshe]] || [[word:dhajage|dhajage]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhajagothoth|dhajagothoth]] || [[word:dhajagojoj|dhajagojoj]] || [[word:dhajagoshosh|dhajagoshosh]] || [[word:dhajag|dhajag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhajagotho|dhajagotho]] || [[word:dhajagojo|dhajagojo]] || [[word:dhajagosho|dhajagosho]] || [[word:dhajago|dhajago]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhajagofoth|dhajagofoth]] || [[word:dhajagofoj|dhajagofoj]] || [[word:dhajagofosh|dhajagofosh]] || [[word:dhajagof|dhajagof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhajag忙th忙|dhajag忙th忙]] || [[word:dhajag忙j忙|dhajag忙j忙]] || [[word:dhajag忙sh忙|dhajag忙sh忙]] || [[word:dhajag忙|dhajag忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhajagathath|dhajagathath]] || [[word:dhajagajaj|dhajagajaj]] || [[word:dhajagashash|dhajagashash]] || [[word:dhajag|dhajag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhajagatha|dhajagatha]] || [[word:dhajagaja|dhajagaja]] || [[word:dhajagasha|dhajagasha]] || [[word:dhajaga|dhajaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhajagafath|dhajagafath]] || [[word:dhajagafaj|dhajagafaj]] || [[word:dhajagafash|dhajagafash]] || [[word:dhajagaf|dhajagaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhajagasha|dhajagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhajagasha|godhajagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhajagasha|gokidhajagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhajagn眉sha|dhajagn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhajagnkn眉sha|godhajagnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhajagn眉sha|gokidhajagn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhajagsh毛sha|dhajagsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhajagnksh毛sha|godhajagnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhajagsh毛sha|gokidhajagsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhajagrosha|dhajagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhajagnkrosha|godhajagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhajagrosha|gokidhajagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhajagmusha|dhajagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhajagnkmusha|godhajagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhajagmusha|gokidhajagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhajagsherasha|dhajagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhajagnksherasha|godhajagnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhajagsherasha|gokidhajagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhajagngasha|dhajagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhajagnkngasha|godhajagnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhajagngasha|gokidhajagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhajagyasha|dhajagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhajagnkyasha|godhajagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhajagyasha|gokidhajagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhajagyamasha|dhajagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhajagnkyamasha|godhajagnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhajagyamasha|gokidhajagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhajagn眉sh毛sha|dhajagn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhajagnkn眉sh毛sha|godhajagnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhajagn眉sh毛sha|gokidhajagn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhajagn眉rosha|dhajagn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhajagnkn眉rosha|godhajagnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhajagn眉rosha|gokidhajagn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhajagn眉musha|dhajagn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhajagnkn眉musha|godhajagnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhajagn眉musha|gokidhajagn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhajagsh毛n眉sha|dhajagsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhajagnksh毛n眉sha|godhajagnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhajagsh毛n眉sha|gokidhajagsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhajagsh毛rosha|dhajagsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhajagnksh毛rosha|godhajagnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhajagsh毛rosha|gokidhajagsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhajagsh毛musha|dhajagsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhajagnksh毛musha|godhajagnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhajagsh毛musha|gokidhajagsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhajagron眉sha|dhajagron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhajagnkron眉sha|godhajagnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhajagron眉sha|gokidhajagron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhajagrosh毛sha|dhajagrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhajagnkrosh毛sha|godhajagnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhajagrosh毛sha|gokidhajagrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhajagromusha|dhajagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhajagnkromusha|godhajagnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhajagromusha|gokidhajagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhajagmun眉sha|dhajagmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhajagnkmun眉sha|godhajagnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhajagmun眉sha|gokidhajagmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhajagmush毛sha|dhajagmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhajagnkmush毛sha|godhajagnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhajagmush毛sha|gokidhajagmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhajagmurosha|dhajagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhajagnkmurosha|godhajagnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhajagmurosha|gokidhajagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhajag|dhajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dh忙j忙g|dh忙j忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhajag|hodhajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodh忙j忙g|hodh忙j忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhajag|hohodhajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodh忙j忙g|hohodh忙j忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dhajag|n眉dhajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉dh忙j忙g|n眉dh忙j忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dhajag|n眉n眉dhajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dh忙j忙g|n眉n眉dh忙j忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dhajag|n茂dhajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂dh忙j忙g|n茂dh忙j忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dhajag|n茂n茂dhajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dh忙j忙g|n茂n茂dh忙j忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhajag|ludhajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludh忙j忙g|ludh忙j忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhajag|luludhajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludh忙j忙g|luludh忙j忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhajag|lidhajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidh忙j忙g|lidh忙j忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhajag|lilidhajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidh忙j忙g|lilidh忙j忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhajag|kodhajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodh忙j忙g|kodh忙j忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhajag|kokodhajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodh忙j忙g|kokodh忙j忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhajag|kedhajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedh忙j忙g|kedh忙j忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhajag|kekedhajag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedh忙j忙g|kekedh忙j忙g]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
